signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been completed as of April 13, 2026, driving record-breaking transaction volume on the XRPL[4].

signals.headline: Solana Drift Protocol $280M Hack (April 1) | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Drift Protocol $280M Hack (April 1) | YES | HIGH confidence**
A Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked on April 1, with attackers withdrawing at least $280 million through sophisticated social engineering targeting Security Council members[6].
